first_line: O My God, My God! Aid Thy servants who are turning steadfastly towards Thy Cause, and guide those who have turned away, that they may turn towards Thee. Then bestow Thy bounties upon Thy loved ones [3.5s]

translations.text: O Bondye, Bondye mwen! Bay èd Ou pou sèvitè fidèl Ou yo kapab genyen kè ki plen lanmou e ki dou. Ede yo gaye pami tout nasyon yo ki sou latè limyè direksyon an ki soti nan Lame anwo a. An verite, se Ou menm Ki Fò, Ki Plen Pouvwa a, Pisan an, Sila a K’ap Domine Tout Bagay, K’ap Toujou Padone. An verite, se Ou menm Ki Renmen Bay, Ki Ale Dousman, Ki Gen Kè Sansib, Sila a Ki Gen Plis Bonte.
